In 2019, Ukraine adopted a law that makes using the Ukrainian language obligatory in all spheres of public life, including government, medicine, science, education, and the media. Failure to comply can result in fines. Since 2022, when the military conflict with Russia began, Ukraine has undertaken a campaign of total de-Russification, with MPs saying it is necessary in order to defend against Russian influence. Local authorities have introduced complete bans on Russian-language works of art, performances, books, films, songs, and its study in schools and universities, and recommended that schoolchildren communicate in Ukrainian even during breaks.	fr_FR	En 2019, l'Ukraine a adopté une loi qui rend obligatoire l'utilisation de la langue ukrainienne dans toutes les sphères de la vie publique (administration, médecine, science, éducation et médias, entre autres). Depuis 2022, année où le conflit militaire avec la Russie a commencé, l'Ukraine a entrepris une campagne de dérussification totale, les députés déclarant que c'était nécessaire pour se défendre de l'influence russe. Les autorités locales ont mis en place des interdictions totales sur les œuvres d'art, les concerts, les livres, les films et les chansons en langue russe, ainsi que sur l'étude de cette langue dans les universités, et ont recommandé que les élèves s'expriment en ukrainien, même pendant les pauses.

The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	hi_IN	ईपीए की समस्याएं अलग तरह की हैं, लेकिन वे पर्यावरण से जुड़े उन अपराधों से अलग नहीं हैं जिन्हें डिपार्टमेंट ऑफ़ जस्टिस के तहत काम करने वाला विभाग, एनवायरनमेंट एंड नेचुरल रिसोर्सेज़ डिवीज़न (ईएनआरडी) देखता है. ऊमन, ईपीए में एनफ़ोर्समेंट से जुड़े मामलों के असिस्टेंट सेक्रेटरी हैं. ईपीए से जुड़ने से पहले वह लंबे समय (1990 से 2007) तक ईएनआरडी के एनवायरमेंटल क्राइम सेक्शन डिवीज़न के प्रमुख थे. ईपीए, दीवानी और फ़ौजदारी से जुड़े गंभीर मामलों को कार्रवाई के लिए ईएनआरडी के पास भेजता है. हालांकि, फंडिंग की कमी से जूझने वाले इस विभाग को, जिन मामलों में कानूनी लड़ाई लड़नी होती है उन्हें चुनने के लिए दूसरी एजेंसियों पर निर्भर रहना पड़ता है. वित्त वर्ष 2022 में, ईपीए, साल 2000 से लेकर अब तक सबसे कम मामले (88) डिपार्टमेंट ऑफ़ जस्टिस के पास भेज पाया और दीवानी से जुड़े कम ही न्यायिक मामलों का निपटारा कर सका. एनवायरनमेंटल इंटीग्रिटी प्रोजेक्ट में यह बताया गया है कि ट्रंप प्रशासन में भी हालात इतने खराब नहीं थे. ट्रंप के कार्यकाल में ईपीए ने दीवानी से जुड़े 94 मामले निपटाए गए थे और हर साल औसतन 106 मामले डिपार्टमेंट ऑफ़ जस्टिस के पास भेजे गए थे.

This type of installation is essential to gain practical experience of reactor operation, but can still be deadly if the delicate balance isn't maintained.	pt_BR	Agora, preciso citar rapidamente o nome do reator, já que foi considerado uma instalação zero energia. Another useful resource the FAA links to is the Boeing Worldwide Statistical Summary of Commercial Jet Airplane Accidents 1959-2022, which assesses plane-type safety by breaking down accidents based on the aircraft model. According to the report, which was published in September 2023, the Boeing 787 and Airbus A350 are the aircraft models with the fewest total hull losses, an accident in which the aircraft is destroyed beyond repair. There are a few additional models in the report that have never experienced a hull loss, including the double-decker behemoth Airbus A380. But those models had accumulated fewer than 1 million departures at the time of the report.	el_GR	Άλλος ένας χρήσιμος πόρος στον οποίο παραπέμπει η FAA είναι η Παγκόσμια Στατιστική Σύνοψη της Boeing για τα Ατυχήματα με Εμπορικά Αεροσκάφη Τζετ 1959-2022, η οποία αξιολογεί την ασφάλεια κατά τύπο αεροπλάνου αναλύοντας τα ατυχήματα βάσει του μοντέλου αεροσκάφους. Σύμφωνα με την έκθεση, η οποία δημοσιεύτηκε τον Σεπτέμβριο του 2023, τα Boeing 787 και Airbus A350 είναι τα μοντέλα αεροσκαφών με τις λιγότερες συνολικές απώλειες ατράκτου, ένα ατύχημα όπου το αεροσκάφος καταστρέφεται ανεπανόρθωτα. What is there to excavate if Cosa is originally a Roman site? Was the Pantheon in Rome excavated? No, the Pantheon is even at the same ground level as the surrounding, contemporary buildings. And why is that? Because the Pantheon was probably built during the Roman era. It is also almost cardinally oriented, which indicates that it cannot be very ancient.	es_MX	Bienvenidos a Cosa, Italia. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier is a monument dedicated to servicemen who gave everything in defense of our country. Located in Arlington National Cemetery, Virginia, and attracting millions of visitors each year, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier stands proudly protected by tomb sentinels. The soldiers of the 3rd United States Infantry Regiment, the Old Guard, took over the right to guard the Tomb in April of 1948, and continue to carry on this sacred duty. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier has been guarded 24 hours a day, seven days a week, 365 days a year, for the past 77 years.	lv_LV	Nezināmā kareivja kapakmens ir piemineklis, kas veltīts militāristiem, kas atdeva visu, aizstāvot mūsu valsti. Tas atrodas Arlingtonas Nacionālajā kapsētā Virdžīnijā un ik gadu piesaista miljoniem apmeklētāju. Nezināmā kareivja kapakmeni lepni sargā kapakmens sargi. 1948. gada aprīlī 3. Amerikas Savienoto Valstu kājnieku pulks jeb Vecā gvarde pārņēma tiesības uz kapakmeņa sargāšanu, un tas turpina pildīt šo svēto pienākumu. Right now the country of "co-determination" is simultaneously facing an eight-day "action week" by irate farmers, who blocked roads with tractors, a three-day strike of railway workers and, to top it off, a looming strike of doctors, who already closed surgeries between Christmas and New Year's Day. Right now the country of "co-determination" is simultaneously facing an eight-day "action week" by irate farmers, who blocked roads with tractors, a three-day strike of railway workers and, to top it off, a looming strike of doctors, who already closed surgeries between Christmas and New Year's Day. In general I really like the interplay between the two games. The advantage of shortform stories is that you can "skip to the good part", they can be more immediately engrossing and satisfying. The advantage of longform stories is that you can imbue whatever happens with way more emotional weight, you lose the immediacy in exchange for stronger payoffs.	de_DE	Generell gefällt mir das Zusammenwirken beider Spiele ausgesprochen gut. Der Vorteil von kurzen Geschichten ist, dass man „zum guten Teil springen kann“. Das kann spannender und befriedigender sein. Bei langen Geschichten ist der Vorteil, dass man den Handlungselementen ein viel größeres emotionales Gewicht geben kann. Es passiert zwar nicht sofort etwas, dafür kriegt man aber auch mehr.

The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	el_GR	Τα προβλήματα στην EPA είναι διακριτά αλλά δεν είναι άσχετα με αυτά που αντιμετωπίζει το Υπουργείο Δικαιοσύνης, το οποίο χειρίζεται τα περιβαλλοντικά εγκλήματα μέσω του Τομέα Περιβαλλοντικών και Φυσικών Πόρων, ή αλλιώς ENRD. Πριν ενταχθεί στην EPA, ο Ούλμανν –βοηθός γραμματέας της EPA για τη νομοθετική συμμόρφωση– υπηρέτησε για πολλά χρόνια ως επικεφαλής του Τμήματος Περιβαλλοντικών Εγκλημάτων του εν λόγω τομέα, από το 1990 έως το 2007. Η EPA παραπέμπει τις πιο σοβαρές αστικές και ποινικές υποθέσεις της στον ENRD, ο οποίος –ως σχετικά υποχρηματοδοτούμενη υπηρεσία– συχνά βασίζεται σε άλλες υπηρεσίες που τον βοηθούν να επιλέξει ποιες μάχες θα δώσει. Κατά το οικονομικό έτος 2022, η EPA παρέπεμψε λιγότερες υποθέσεις στο Υπουργείο Δικαιοσύνης (88) σε σύγκριση με οποιαδήποτε χρονική στιγμή από το 2000, ενώ επίσης έκλεισε λιγότερες αστικές δικαστικές υποθέσεις από όσες είχε κλείσει στο ίδιο χρονικό διάστημα. Όπως επισημαίνεται στο Έργο για την Περιβαλλοντική Ακεραιότητα, ακόμη και επί Τραμπ η EPA έκλεινε ετησίως 94 αστικές υποθέσεις και παρέπεμπε ετησίως 106 υποθέσεις κατά μέσο όρο στο Υπουργείο Δικαιοσύνης.

Failure to comply can result in fines. Since 2022, when the military conflict with Russia began, Ukraine has undertaken a campaign of total de-Russification, with MPs saying it is necessary in order to defend against Russian influence. Local authorities have introduced complete bans on Russian-language works of art, performances, books, films, songs, and its study in schools and universities, and recommended that schoolchildren communicate in Ukrainian even during breaks.	es_MX	En 2019, Ucrania aprobó una ley por la que obliga a usar el ucraniano en todos los ámbitos de la vida pública como el gobierno, la medicina, la educación y los medios de comunicación. Knight of the Galactic Railroad by Kenji Miyazawa. In general I really like the interplay between the two games. The advantage of shortform stories is that you can "skip to the good part", they can be more immediately engrossing and satisfying. The advantage of longform stories is that you can imbue whatever happens with way more emotional weight, you lose the immediacy in exchange for stronger payoffs.	fr_FR	De manière générale, j'aime vraiment le chevauchement entre les deux jeux. L'avantage des histoires courtes est que vous pouvez "vite passer à la partie intéressante", cela les rend immédiatement satisfaisantes. L'avantage des histoires longues est que vous pouvez vous imprégner de tout ce qui se passe avec bien plus d'émotions, vous perdez la spontanéité en échange de quelque chose de plus fort.

The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	ar_SA	مشاكل وكالة EPA واضحة للجميع، لكنها أيضًا مرتبطة بالمسؤولين في وزارة العدل، اللي بتتعامل مع الجرائم البيئية من خلال إدارة البيئة والموارد الطبيعية (ENRD). الأمين المساعد الحالي لإنفاذ القانون في وكالة EPA، أولمان، كان في السابق رئيس قسم الجرائم البيئية في ENRD من 1990 إلى 2007. في ذلك الحين كانت وكالة EPA بتحوّل أهم القضايا المدنية والجنائية لإدارة ENRD. لكن بما أنها إدارة حكومية بتمويل محدود، كانت بتعتمد على جهات حكومية أخرى لكي تختار القضايا اللي تدخل فيها. في 2022، أحالت وكالة EPA أقل عدد من القضايا لوزارة العدل (88 قضية)، أي أقل من سنة 2000. المنظمة البيئية EIP ترى إن الوكالة خفضت متوسط القضايا اللي بتحولها لوزارة العدل في عهد ترامب إلى 94 قضية مدنية و106 قضايا جنائية في العام.

Unfortunately, this consultation paper seems like a further attempt to impose controls on the sector. A far simpler solution would be to let the market return to normal, not impose external controls on rent levels, and the result will be lower rent increases than we have seen in the last 18 months. To stabilise rental prices in the long term then the government must encourage greater investment and growth in the private rented sector (PRS) while simultaneously funding a substantial growth in the supply of social housing. The greater the investment in the PRS the more stability will be created in the housing market. Increasing volumes in both the PRS and social housing markets will stabilise rents over time as demand meets supply and equilibrium is achieved. Only by adopting these measures will we start to address the current housing crisis. Anything else is simply not going to work.	ur_PK	بد قسمتی سے، اس مشاورتی پیپر کا مقصد شعبے پر کنٹرول حاصل کرنے کی مزید کوشش کرنا لگتا ہے۔ اس کی نسبت ایک انتہائی سادہ حل یہ ہو گا کہ مارکیٹ کو نارمل حالت پر واپس جانے دیا جائے، کرائے کی سطحوں پر بیرونی کنٹرولز عائد نہ کیے جائیں، اور اس کا نتیجہ کرائے میں پچھلے 18 مہینوں میں جو ہم نے دیکھا ہے اس سے کم اضافہ ہو گا۔ کرائے کی قیمتوں میں طویل مدتی استحکام کے لیے حکومت کو نجی کرایہ داری کے شعبے (PRS) میں زیادہ سرمایہ کاری اور بڑھوتری کی حوصلہ افزائی کرنی چاہیے جبکہ اس کے ساتھ ساتھ سوشل ہاؤسنگ کی سپلائی میں کافی بڑھوتری کو فنڈ کرنا چاہیے۔ PRS میں سرمایہ کاری جتنی زیادہ ہو گی اتنا ہی ہاؤسنگ کی مارکیٹ میں استحکام پیدا ہو گا۔ PRS اور سوشل ہاؤسنگ مارکیٹس دونوں میں والیومز کو بڑھانے سے وقت کے ساتھ کرائے میں استحکام آ جائے گا کیونکہ رسد طلب کے مطابق ہو گی اور توازن حاصل ہو گا۔ صرف ان اقدامات پر عمل پیرا ہو کر ہی ہم ہاؤسنگ کے موجودہ بحران سے نمٹنا شروع کریں گے۔ کوئی اور طریقہ کار بالکل بھی کام نہیں کرے گا۔

Ngay cả trong những thời điểm khó khăn nhất, chúng ta vẫn luôn vươn lên và thích nghi. Các thành phố vẫn phát triển thịnh vượng hơn bao giờ hết, cùng với đó, nền công nghệ của chúng ta cũng lớn mạnh không ngừng. About 450 million years ago, plants took a giant leap out of the oceans onto the land to become the plants that we know and love today. But how did they survive? Scientists at the John Innes Centre may have found out. Land plants survive by getting water and nutrients from the soil. They do this by forming a special friendship with soil-dwelling fungi called mycorrhiza. These strands of mycorrhiza reach deep into the soil and drag the nutrients and water back to the plants. But when the first algae landed on soil, how did they survive long enough to form these beneficial friendships?	et_EE	Ligi 450 miljonit aastat tagasi tegid taimed suure hüppe ookeanidest maale, et neist saaksid taimed, mida me täna teame ja armastame. Nad teevad seda, luues erilise sõpruse pinnases elavate mycorrhiza seentega. Need mycorrhiza harud ulatuvad sügavale pinnasesse ja juhivad toitained ja vee tagasi taimedeni. Kuid ajal, kui esimesed vetikad pinnasel maabusid, siis kuidas jäid nad nii kauaks ellu, et luua sellised kasulikud sõprussuhted?

Knight of the Galactic Railroad by Kenji Miyazawa. This is a Japanese story of two young boys who embark on a mystical journey on a celestial train, going through the galaxy, encountering various allegorical experiences and deep philosophical themes. As they navigate the night sky, the story reflects on life, death, and the human condition, leaving readers with a profound exploration of existence and the universe. The novel was adapted into a manga in 1983 and an anime in 1985.	da_DK	Knight of the Galactic Railroad af Kenji Miyazawa. Dette er en japansk fortælling om to unge drenge, der begiver sig ud på en mytisk rejse på et himmelsk tog, på rejse gennem galaksen, hvor de gennemlever forskellige allegoriske oplevelser og dybe filosofiske temaer. Mens de navigerer nattehimlen, reflekterer fortællingen over livet, døden og menneskets vilkår, der efterlader læseren til en dybsindig udforskning af eksistensen og universet. Romanen blev adapteret til en manga i 1983 og en anime i 1985.

Masterfully working across subject matter, Siso has generated a prolific series of landscapes, portraits, and still-life works rendered in either acrylic, pastel, pencil or watercolor. Drawing from family portraits, his own reference photographs, and recollection, his colorful compositions demonstrate his range of interests and skill across media. Siso's tropical landscapes and seascapes reflect the geographies of his past, employing rich patterns and incorporating people to make meaningful connections between culture, memory and the environment. Siso titles his artworks in a mix of Spanish and English, signifying the celebrated and integral complexities of his life in Los Angeles County. "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" opens on Saturday, Jan. 13, with a reception from 6-8 p.m. The exhibition is on view through Sunday, March 3.	is_IS	Með mismunandi efnistökum hefur Siso skapað afkastamikla seríu af landslagsmálverkum, andlitsmyndum og kyrralífsmyndum sem eru ýmist gerðar með akríl, pastel, blýanti eða vatnslitum. Í litríkum verkum sínum sýnir Siso fram á fjölbreyttan efnivið og víðtækar nálganir og byggir ýmist á fjölskyldumyndum, minningum eða eigin ljósmyndum. Landslagsmyndir hans af suðrænum svæðum og hafinu endurspegla landslag fortíðar hans, og beitir hann áhrifamiklum mynstrum og mannlýsingum til að draga fram merkingarþrungnar tengingar á milli menningarheima, minninga og umhverfis. Siso titlar málverk sín með blöndu af spænsku og ensku, sem er táknrænt fyrir þau djúpstæðu og margbrotnu tengsl sem einkenna líf hans í Los Angeles-sýslu. „Vicente Siso: minningar um landið og vatnið“ opnar laugardaginn 13. janúar með galleríopnun frá 18–20. Sýningin stendur til sunnudagsins 3. mars.

About 450 million years ago, plants took a giant leap out of the oceans onto the land to become the plants that we know and love today. But how did they survive? Scientists at the John Innes Centre may have found out. Land plants survive by getting water and nutrients from the soil. They do this by forming a special friendship with soil-dwelling fungi called mycorrhiza. These strands of mycorrhiza reach deep into the soil and drag the nutrients and water back to the plants. But when the first algae landed on soil, how did they survive long enough to form these beneficial friendships?	tr_TR	450 milyon yıl kadar önce, bitkiler okyanuslardan çıkıp karaya yerleşti ve bugün bildiğimiz ve sevdiğimiz bitkiler haline geldi. Ama karada nasıl hayatta kaldılar? John Innes Merkezinde görev yapan bilim insanları bu soruya yanıt bulmuş olabilir. Kara bitkileri topraktan su ve besin maddesi alarak hayatta kalır. Bunu yaparken mikoriza (kök mantarlar) adı verilen toprakta yaşayan mantarlar ile özel bir arkadaşlık kurarlar. Mikorizanın zincirleri toprağın derinlerine kadar ulaşır ve besin maddelerini ve suyu bitkilere taşır. Ama ilk alg toprağa değdiğinde, bu faydalı arkadaşlıkları oluşturacak kadar uzun süre nasıl hayatta kaldılar?

Unfortunately, this consultation paper seems like a further attempt to impose controls on the sector. A far simpler solution would be to let the market return to normal, not impose external controls on rent levels, and the result will be lower rent increases than we have seen in the last 18 months. To stabilise rental prices in the long term then the government must encourage greater investment and growth in the private rented sector (PRS) while simultaneously funding a substantial growth in the supply of social housing. The greater the investment in the PRS the more stability will be created in the housing market. Increasing volumes in both the PRS and social housing markets will stabilise rents over time as demand meets supply and equilibrium is achieved. Only by adopting these measures will we start to address the current housing crisis. Anything else is simply not going to work.	bn_IN	দুর্ভাগ্যবশত, এই কনসালটেশন পেপারটি সেক্টরের উপর নিয়ন্ত্রণ আরোপ করার আরও একটি প্রচেষ্টা বলে মনে হচ্ছে। একটি আরও সহজ সমাধান হল বাজারকে স্বাভাবিক অবস্থায় ফিরে আসতে দেওয়া, ভাড়ার স্তরের উপর বাহ্যিক নিয়ন্ত্রণ আরোপ না করা, এবং ফলাফলটি হবে আমরা গত ১৮ মাসে যা দেখেছি তার চেয়ে কম ভাড়া বৃদ্ধি। দীর্ঘমেয়াদে ভাড়ার মূল্য স্থিতিশীল করতে সরকারকে অবশ্যই বেসরকারী ভাড়া খাতে (PRS) বৃহত্তর বিনিয়োগ এবং বৃদ্ধিকে উৎসাহিত করতে হবে এবং একই সাথে সামাজিক আবাসনের সরবরাহে উল্লেখযোগ্য বৃদ্ধির জন্য অর্থায়ন করতে হবে। PRS-এ যত বেশি বিনিয়োগ হবে হাউজিং মার্কেটে তত বেশি স্থিতিশীলতা তৈরি হবে। PRS এবং সোশ্যাল হাউজিং মার্কেট উভয় ক্ষেত্রেই ভলিউম বৃদ্ধি সময়ের সাথে সাথে ভাড়াকে স্থিতিশীল করবে কারণ চাহিদা পূরণ হয় এবং ভারসাম্য অর্জিত হয়। শুধুমাত্র এই ব্যবস্থা গ্রহণের মাধ্যমে আমরা বর্তমান আবাসন সংকটের মোকাবিলা শুরু করতে পারব। এর বাইরে কোনও কিছুই কাজ করবে না।

Knight of the Galactic Railroad by Kenji Miyazawa. This is a Japanese story of two young boys who embark on a mystical journey on a celestial train, going through the galaxy, encountering various allegorical experiences and deep philosophical themes. As they navigate the night sky, the story reflects on life, death, and the human condition, leaving readers with a profound exploration of existence and the universe. The novel was adapted into a manga in 1983 and an anime in 1985.	fil_PH	Knight of the Galactic Railroad ni Kenji Miyazawa. Drawing from family portraits, his own reference photographs, and recollection, his colorful compositions demonstrate his range of interests and skill across media. In 2019, Ukraine adopted a law that makes using the Ukrainian language obligatory in all spheres of public life, including government, medicine, science, education, and the media. Failure to comply can result in fines. Since 2022, when the military conflict with Russia began, Ukraine has undertaken a campaign of total de-Russification, with MPs saying it is necessary in order to defend against Russian influence. About 450 million years ago, plants took a giant leap out of the oceans onto the land to become the plants that we know and love today. But how did they survive? Scientists at the John Innes Centre may have found out. Land plants survive by getting water and nutrients from the soil. They do this by forming a special friendship with soil-dwelling fungi called mycorrhiza. These strands of mycorrhiza reach deep into the soil and drag the nutrients and water back to the plants. But when the first algae landed on soil, how did they survive long enough to form these beneficial friendships?	fa_IR	تقریباً ۴۵۰ میلیون سال پیش گیاهان با یک جهش بزرگ از اقیانوس‌ها به زمین آمدند تا گیاهانی که امروزه می‌شناسیم و دوست داریم شوند. اما چطور زنده ماندند؟ دانشمندان در مرکز جان اینز ممکن است این را فهمیده باشند. گیاهان زمینی با گرفتن آب و مواد مغذی از خاک زنده می‌مانند. آن‌ها این کار را با ایجاد دوستی ویژه با قارچ‌های ساکن خاک که میکوریزا نام دارند، انجام می‌دهند. این رشته‌های میکوریزا به اعماق خاک می‌رسند و مواد مغذی و آب را به گیاهان می‌کشند. اما وقتی که اولین جلبک به خشکی و روی خاک آمد، چطور به مدت کافی زنده ماندند تا این دوستی سودمند را ایجاد کنند؟

Knight of the Galactic Railroad by Kenji Miyazawa. This is a Japanese story of two young boys who embark on a mystical journey on a celestial train, going through the galaxy, encountering various allegorical experiences and deep philosophical themes. As they navigate the night sky, the story reflects on life, death, and the human condition, leaving readers with a profound exploration of existence and the universe. The novel was adapted into a manga in 1983 and an anime in 1985.	pt_PT	O Cavaleiro do Caminho-de-Ferro Galáctico, obra de Kenji Miyazawa. Este livro japonês conta a história de dois jovens rapazes que embarcam numa jornada mística, a bordo de um comboio no espaço sideral, que os leva a atravessar a galáxia, levando-os a enfrentar diversas experiências alegóricas e a debater temas filosóficos obscuros. À medida que navegam pelos céus noturnos, a sua história faz-nos refletir sobre a vida, a morte e a condição humana, deixando os leitores com uma análise profunda sobre a existência das coisas e o universo. O romance foi adaptado para o formato de manga em 1983 e para anime em 1985.

The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	is_IS	Vandamálin sem steðja að umhverfisverndarstofnuninni eru aðskilin en ekki ótengd þeim vandamálum sem dómsmálaráðuneytið stendur frammi fyrir, en Umhverfis- og auðlindasvið stofnunarinnar annast dómsmál er varða umhverfisspjöll. Áður en hann gekk til liðs við umhverfisverndarstofnunina gegndi Uhlman – aðstoðarritari umhverfisverndarstofnunarinnar á sviði framfylgd – stöðu yfirmanns umhverfisglæpasviðs stofnunarinnar, en hann sinnti því starfi lengi vel, eða frá 1990-2007. Umhverfisverndarstofnunin sendir sín alvarlegustu saka- og einkamál til Umhverfis- og auðlindasviðsins, en þar sem sviðið er heldur undirfjármagnað þarf það oft og tíðum að leita aðstoðar hjá öðrum stofnunum til að ákvarða hvaða mál séu þess virði að eltast við. Á fjárhagsárinu 2022 áframsendi sviðið færri mál til dómsmálaráðuneytisins en það hefur gert síðan árið 2000, eða 88 mál, og sótti einnig færri saka- og einkamál til hlítar en það hefur gert síðan þá. Eins og eftirlitsstofnunin Environmental Integrity Project hefur bent á þá er það meira að segja færri mál en umhverfisverndarstofnunin annaðist í forsetatíð Trumps, þegar stofnunin lauk árlega að meðaltali 94 einkamálum og áframsendi um 106 mál til dómsmálaráðuneytisins.

In 2019, Ukraine adopted a law that makes using the Ukrainian language obligatory in all spheres of public life, including government, medicine, science, education, and the media. Failure to comply can result in fines. Since 2022, when the military conflict with Russia began, Ukraine has undertaken a campaign of total de-Russification, with MPs saying it is necessary in order to defend against Russian influence. Local authorities have introduced complete bans on Russian-language works of art, performances, books, films, songs, and its study in schools and universities, and recommended that schoolchildren communicate in Ukrainian even during breaks.	pt_PT	Em 2019, a Ucrânia adotou uma lei que torna obrigatória a utilização do ucraniano em todas as esferas da vida pública, incluindo governo, medicina, ciência, educação e meios de comunicação. O incumprimento desta lei pode dar origem a coimas. Desde 2022, quando teve início o conflito militar com a Rússia, a Ucrânia tem levado a cabo uma campanha de desrussificação total. Os deputados ucranianos justificam tal ação como uma defesa contra a influência russa. As autoridades locais proibiram por completo obras de arte, espetáculos, livros, filmes e canções em russo, bem como o ensino desta língua em escolas e universidades, e recomendaram que as crianças em idade escolar comuniquem em ucraniano, mesmo durante o recreio.

About 450 million years ago, plants took a giant leap out of the oceans onto the land to become the plants that we know and love today. But how did they survive? Scientists at the John Innes Centre may have found out. Land plants survive by getting water and nutrients from the soil. They do this by forming a special friendship with soil-dwelling fungi called mycorrhiza. These strands of mycorrhiza reach deep into the soil and drag the nutrients and water back to the plants. But when the first algae landed on soil, how did they survive long enough to form these beneficial friendships?	it_IT	Circa 450 milioni di anni fa, le piante fecero un grande salto dagli oceani alla terraferma per diventare le piante che conosciamo e amiamo oggi. Lo fanno stringendo un'amicizia speciale con dei funghi che vivono nel suolo, chiamata micorriza. I filamenti della micorriza raggiungono le profondità del suolo e portano i nutrienti e l'acqua alle piante. Unfortunately, this consultation paper seems like a further attempt to impose controls on the sector. A far simpler solution would be to let the market return to normal, not impose external controls on rent levels, and the result will be lower rent increases than we have seen in the last 18 months. To stabilise rental prices in the long term then the government must encourage greater investment and growth in the private rented sector (PRS) while simultaneously funding a substantial growth in the supply of social housing. The greater the investment in the PRS the more stability will be created in the housing market. Increasing volumes in both the PRS and social housing markets will stabilise rents over time as demand meets supply and equilibrium is achieved. Only by adopting these measures will we start to address the current housing crisis. Anything else is simply not going to work.	pl_PL	Niestety ów dokument konsultacyjny wygląda na kolejną próbę nałożenia środków kontroli na ten sektor. Zdecydowanie prostszym rozwiązaniem byłoby pozwolenie, aby rynek powrócił do normalnego stanu bez wprowadzania zewnętrznych środków kontroli stawek czynszowych. Aby ustabilizować ceny wynajmu w dłuższym okresie, rząd musi stymulować więcej inwestycji i wzrost w sektorze najmu prywatnego (PRS, ang. private rented sector) przy jednoczesnym finansowaniu znacznego wzrostu w podaży mieszkalnictwa socjalnego. The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	vi_VN	Các vấn đề tại EPA rất khác biệt nhưng không phải không liên quan đến các vấn đề tại Bộ Tư pháp, cơ quan chuyên xử lý những hành vi vi phạm môi trường thông qua Vụ Tài nguyên và Môi trường, hay ENRD. Trước khi gia nhập EPA, Uhlmann - phó bí thư phụ trách thực thi của EPA - đã giữ vị trí người đứng đầu Bộ phận Tội phạm Môi trường của vụ trong thời gian dài, từ năm 1990 đến năm 2007. EPA chuyển các vụ án dân sự và hình sự nghiêm trọng nhất của mình cho ENRD. Là văn phòng với tài chính tương đối thiếu thốn, ENRD thường dựa vào các cơ quan khác trong việc hỗ trợ quyết định xem cần giải quyết vấn đề nào. Trong năm tài khóa 2022, số vụ án EPA đã chuyển cho Bộ Tư Pháp - DOJ ít hơn (88) bất cứ thời điểm nào kể từ năm 2000, cũng như đã giải quyết ít vụ án dân sự hơn kể từ năm đó. Theo ghi nhận của tổ chức Environmental Integrity Project, ngay cả EPA thời cựu tổng thống Trump trung bình cũng đã giải quyết 94 vụ án dân sự và chuyển 106 vụ án cho DOJ mỗi năm.

The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	sk_SK	EPA rieši iné problémy, ktoré však súvisia s problémami Ministerstva spravodlivosti; jeho odbor životného prostredia a prírodných zdrojov (ENRD) totiž rieši environmentálne trestné činy. Asistent tajomníka EPA pre uplatňovanie predpisov Uhlmann pôsobil pred nástupom do EPA v rokoch 1990 až 2007 ako dlhoročný šéf úseku environmentálnych trestných činov uvedeného odboru. EPA posiela najzávažnejšie občianskoprávne prípady a trestné činy odboru ENRD, ktorý, ako relatívne podfinancovaný úrad, sa pri rozhodovaní o tom, ktoré prípady prevziať, často spolieha na iné ministerstvá. Vo fiškálnom roku 2022 postúpila organizácia EPA Ministerstvu spravodlivosti menej prípadov (88) než v ktoromkoľvek období od roku 2000, a takisto od tohto obdobia uzavrela najmenej občianskoprávnych súdnych sporov. Ako dodáva organizácia Environmental Integrity Project, EPA dokonca aj za Trumpovho pôsobenia v úrade uzavrela 94 občianskoprávnych súdnych sporov a postúpila Ministerstvu spravodlivosti priemerne 106 prípadov ročne.

Another useful resource the FAA links to is the Boeing Worldwide Statistical Summary of Commercial Jet Airplane Accidents 1959-2022, which assesses plane-type safety by breaking down accidents based on the aircraft model. According to the report, which was published in September 2023, the Boeing 787 and Airbus A350 are the aircraft models with the fewest total hull losses, an accident in which the aircraft is destroyed beyond repair. There are a few additional models in the report that have never experienced a hull loss, including the double-decker behemoth Airbus A380. But those models had accumulated fewer than 1 million departures at the time of the report.	vi_VN	Một nguồn thông tin hữu ích khác được FAA dẫn liên kết đó là Tóm tắt Thống kê Toàn cầu về các vụ Tai nạn Máy bay Phản lực Thương mại giai đoạn 1959-2022, trong đó đánh giá sự an toàn của từng loại máy bay dựa trên việc phân tích số liệu tai nạn các model máy bay. Theo báo cáo được phát hành vào tháng 9 năm 2023, Boeing 787 và Airbus A350 là những model máy bay có tổng thiệt hại về thân máy bay ít nhất, trong đó có một vụ tai nạn mà máy bay bị hỏng không thể sửa chữa được. Còn một vài model khác trong báo cáo chưa bao giờ bị thiệt hại thân vỏ, trong đó có chiếc Airbus A380 hai tầng khổng lồ. Nhưng tính tổng cộng, các model đó có số lượt khởi hành chưa đến 1 triệu chuyến tại thời điểm báo cáo.

On Google Flights, it's included in the flight details when a listing is expanded, and it's usually listed on individual airlines" reservation pages. Hook the vacuum up to it, it helps keep the dust down, and you can prep your concrete that way also. We prefer to do it with the hand grinders ourself, so either way will work pretty good. Usually if it's got an epoxy coating already, the hand grinders work a little better, but this thing works really good too. So after we do that, we fix all the cracks, fix all the divots with our patch repair material, and then we grind them smooth. And then we clean the concrete and get it ready for the first coating. This is going to be a 100% solids epoxy, so it goes on in its different procedures, different stages.	is_IS	Tengið ryksuguna til að draga úr rykinu, og þið getið undirbúið steypuna á sama máta. Persónulega finnst okkur betra að nota slípirokk, en hvor leiðin sem er virkar. Venjulega, ef það er nú þegar epoxy-húðun á steypunni, þá virka slípirokkarnir aðeins betur, en þetta hérna virkar vel líka. Þannig að þegar það er komið þá lögum við allar sprungurnar, allar holurnar, með viðgerðarmúrnum, og síðan slípum við þar til þetta er slétt. Og síðan þrífum við steypuna og undirbúum hana fyrir fyrstu umferðina. Þetta verður 100% gegnheilt epoxy, svo það fer á í nokkrum hollum og með mismunandi hætti.

The report also includes a comparison of hull loss accident rates per million departures, which helps account for the fact that some of the models are more common or have been around longer than others. The Airbus A310, which was introduced in 1983, has the highest rate of hull losses - 2.53 per 1 million departures - among the models that are still in service as passenger aircraft. The Airbus 320 family, which includes the A321 and A319neo, has the lowest rate, at 0.11. The Boeing 737 MAX line, which has been around since 2017, has a rate of 1.48.	zu_ZA	Lo mbiko uphinde uhlanganise ukuqhathanisa kwezinga lezingozi zokulahleka kwesiqu ngesigidi sokuhamba, okusiza ukuchaza iqiniso lokuthi amanye amamodeli ajwayelekile noma abelokhu ekhona isikhathi eside kunamanye. I-Airbus A310, eyethulwa ngo-1983, inesilinganiso esiphakeme kakhulu sokulahlekelwa isiqu - 2.53 ngesigidi esiyi-1 sokuhamba - phakathi kwamamodeli asasebenza njengezindiza zabagibeli. Umkhaya we-Airbus 320, ohlanganisa i-A321 ne-A319neo, unesilinganiso esiphansi kunazo zonke, esingu-0,11. Indiza ye-Boeing 737 MAX, ibilokhu ikhona kusukela ngo-2017, unesilinganiso esingu-1.48.

The report also includes a comparison of hull loss accident rates per million departures, which helps account for the fact that some of the models are more common or have been around longer than others. The Airbus A310, which was introduced in 1983, has the highest rate of hull losses - 2.53 per 1 million departures - among the models that are still in service as passenger aircraft. The Airbus 320 family, which includes the A321 and A319neo, has the lowest rate, at 0.11. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier is a monument dedicated to servicemen who gave everything in defense of our country. Located in Arlington National Cemetery, Virginia, and attracting millions of visitors each year, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier stands proudly protected by tomb sentinels. The soldiers of the 3rd United States Infantry Regiment, the Old Guard, took over the right to guard the Tomb in April of 1948, and continue to carry on this sacred duty. Affordable furniture DIYs are always a hit here on Lone Fox, so I wanted to share with you guys how I created this nightstand from a simple crate from IKEA. So this is the Knagglig crate, which you can pick up for about $10 at IKEA. And I went ahead and I started off by just constructing it based off the instructions. You have to just screw all of the elements together. And once they are all screwed up, you have a basic wooden crate. Now on the bottom of the wooden crate, I wanted to add a leg, so I elevated it off the floor with these little wooden trinket dishes, or like little wooden trays that I found at the craft store as well. They are just a simple wood, very similar to the one from IKEA, and I just E6000ed these down. You could also use a nail gun if you'd like to. And once you are done, you have a very simple, minimal nightstand.	he_IL	רהיטים זולים שקל לבנות הם תמיד להיט כאן ב-Lone Fox, אז רציתי לחלוק איתכם איך יצרתי את השידה הזאת מארגז פשוט מאיקאה. זה ארגז Knagglig, שעולה כ-10 דולר באיקאה. אני כבר בניתי אותו לפי ההוראות. צריך רק להבריג את כל הרכיבים זה לזה. אחרי שהכול מוברג, יש לכם ארגז עץ בסיסי. בתחתית הארגז רציתי להוסיף רגל, אז הרמתי אותו מהרצפה באמצעות כלי העץ הזולים והקטנים האלה, סוג של מגשים מעץ שגם אותם מצאתי בחנות מלאכת היד. הם עשויים מעץ פשוט, דומה מאוד לזה של איקאה, ואני פשוט הדבקתי אותם בדבק E6000. אפשר להשתמש גם באקדח מסמרים אם רוצים. כשתסיימו תהיה לכם שידה פשוטה ומינימליסטית.

Masterfully working across subject matter, Siso has generated a prolific series of landscapes, portraits, and still-life works rendered in either acrylic, pastel, pencil or watercolor. Drawing from family portraits, his own reference photographs, and recollection, his colorful compositions demonstrate his range of interests and skill across media. Siso's tropical landscapes and seascapes reflect the geographies of his past, employing rich patterns and incorporating people to make meaningful connections between culture, memory and the environment. Siso titles his artworks in a mix of Spanish and English, signifying the celebrated and integral complexities of his life in Los Angeles County. "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" opens on Saturday, Jan. 13, with a reception from 6-8 p.m. The exhibition is on view through Sunday, March 3.	hi_IN	कई तरह के विषयों पर बेहतरीन तरीके से काम करते हुए, सीसो ने एक प्रोफ़ाइल सीरीज़ तैयार की. इसमें ऐक्रिलिक, पेस्टल, पेंसिल या वॉटरकलर से बनाए गए लैंडस्केप, पोर्ट्रेट, और स्टिल-लाइफ़ के आर्टवर्क शामिल हैं. परिवार के लोगों की पोर्ट्रेट, खुद से जुड़ी फ़ोटोग्राफ, भूली-बिसरी यादों को संजोने वाली तस्वीरें, और रंग-बिरंगी कलाकृतियां उनकी कई रुचियों और अलग-अलग मीडिया में उनकी प्रतिभा की झलक दिखाती हैं. सीसो के ऊष्णकटीबंधीय लैंडस्केप और सीस्केप, उनके बीते समय के भौगोलिक परिदृश्य को दिखाते हैं. इसमें संस्कृति, यादों, और पर्यावरण का एक-दूसरे से संबंध और उनके मायने दिखाने के लिए, बेहतरीन पैटर्नों का इस्तेमाल करके उनमें लोगों को दिखाया गया है. सीसो अपने आर्टवर्क के टाइटल, अंग्रेज़ी और स्पैनिश भाषा को मिलाकर रखते हैं, जो लॉस एंजलिस में उनकी ज़िंदगी की जटिलता की झलक दिखाते हैं. “Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water” प्रदर्शनी शनिवार, 13 जनवरी से शुरू हो रही है और इसका कार्यक्रम उसी दिन शाम 6 से 8 बजे तक होगा. यह प्रदर्शनी रविवार, 3 मार्च तक चलेगी.

The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier is a monument dedicated to servicemen who gave everything in defense of our country. Located in Arlington National Cemetery, Virginia, and attracting millions of visitors each year, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier stands proudly protected by tomb sentinels. The soldiers of the 3rd United States Infantry Regiment, the Old Guard, took over the right to guard the Tomb in April of 1948, and continue to carry on this sacred duty. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier has been guarded 24 hours a day, seven days a week, 365 days a year, for the past 77 years.	et_EE	Tundmatu sõduri haud on monument sõduritele, kes on meie riigi kaitsel endast kõik andnud. See asub Virginias Arlingtoni riiklikul surnuaial ja tõmbab igal aastal ligi miljoneid külastajaid. Tundmatu sõduri hauda kaitsevad uhkelt hauavalvurid. Haua valvamise õiguse võtsid 1948. aasta aprillis üle Ameerika Ühendriikide 3. jalaväerügemendi (nn „Old Guard”) sõdurid, kes tänaseni seda püha kohustust täidavad. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier is a monument dedicated to servicemen who gave everything in defense of our country. Located in Arlington National Cemetery, Virginia, and attracting millions of visitors each year, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier stands proudly protected by tomb sentinels. The soldiers of the 3rd United States Infantry Regiment, the Old Guard, took over the right to guard the Tomb in April of 1948, and continue to carry on this sacred duty. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier has been guarded 24 hours a day, seven days a week, 365 days a year, for the past 77 years.	sw_TZ	Kaburi la Askari Asiyejulikana ni ukumbusho wa wanajeshi waliojitoa kwa kila kitu kuilinda nchi yetu. However, it is crucial to note that the request violates various sections of Nigeria's Financial Regulations 2009, which explicitly prohibit fraud and other forms of corruption in government business. Additionally, Chapter Seven, Section 713 of Nigeria's Financial Regulations 2009 explicitly states, "Personal money shall in no circumstances be paid into a government bank account, nor shall any public money be paid into a private account." It further stipulates, "Any officer who pays public money into a private account is deemed to have done so with fraudulent intention."	pl_PL	Rasheed Zubair, doradca Edu ds. mediów, zabierając głos w jej imieniu zapewnia, że ustawa jest legalna w ramach nigeryjskiej służby cywilnej. This tapering proposal would set rent increases between 6 per cent and a maximum of 15 per cent which, ironically, would be higher than historic annual price rises. But, more importantly, this scheme would be unwieldy, overly complex and prohibitively expensive to monitor and implement. We already have a system involving the first-tier housing tribunal which rules on whether a rent increase is fair. This seems like adding further layers of bureaucracy with no gain for landlords or tenants.	fr_FR	Cette proposition fixerait la hausse des loyers entre 6 et 15 %, soit plus que les hausses annuelles historiques. Nous disposons déjà d'un système impliquant un tribunal de premier niveau, qui décide si une hausse de loyer est juste ou non. Another useful resource the FAA links to is the Boeing Worldwide Statistical Summary of Commercial Jet Airplane Accidents 1959-2022, which assesses plane-type safety by breaking down accidents based on the aircraft model. According to the report, which was published in September 2023, the Boeing 787 and Airbus A350 are the aircraft models with the fewest total hull losses, an accident in which the aircraft is destroyed beyond repair. There are a few additional models in the report that have never experienced a hull loss, including the double-decker behemoth Airbus A380. But those models had accumulated fewer than 1 million departures at the time of the report.	sr_RS	Још један користан извор на који FAA даје линк је светски статистички сажетак компаније Боинг о незгодама цивилних авиона у периоду 1959–2022, који оцењује безбедност типа авиона рашчлањивањем незгода на основу модела летелице. Према извештају објављеном у септембру 2023, Боинг 787 и Ербас A350 су модели авиона са најмањим бројем губитака целог трупа, што је вид незгоде у којој је летелица претрпела непоправљива оштећења. У извештају се наводи још неколико модела који никад нису имали незгоду са губитком целог трупа, као што је двопалубни џин, Ербас A380. Међутим, ти модели у време објављивања извештаја још увек имају мање од 1 милион полазака.

Thus, we had the introduction of the Cost of Living (Tenant protection) (Scotland) Act 2022 nearly 18 months ago which sought to cap rents for a limited period to ease the pressures of the cost-of-living crisis. What we find now from the latest Scottish Government statistics is that, in the last year alone, average rents have increased in all sized properties, ranging from the lowest rise of 11.7 per cent for one-bedroom to the highest figure of 14.3 per cent for two-bedroom homes. Every type of property (from one to four bedroom to a room in a property) has had a double digit increase in rents since the Cost of Living legislation was introduced in October 2022, exceeding the annual average increases in rents over the previous 12 years by a factor of at least three.	ar_EG	وعلشان كده صدر قانون تكلفة المعيشة (حماية المستأجرين) (اسكتلندا) 2022 من حوالي 18 شهر، واللي كان هدفه يقلل تكلفة الإيجار لفترة مؤقتة عشان يخفف شوية من ضغط أزمة تكلفة المعيشة. حسب الإحصائيات اللي أعلنتها الحكومة الاسكتلندية مؤخرًا، الإيجارات السنة اللي فاتت بس زادت لكل العقارات بمختلف أحجامها، والزيادة دي بتتراوح من أقل نسبة زيادة 11.7% للشقق اللي فيها أوضة نوم واحدة، لحد أعلى نسبة زيادة 14.3% للشقق اللي فيها أوضتين نوم. الزيادة في إيجارات كل نوع من العقارات (من اللي فيها أوضة نوم واحدة لحد اللي فيها أربع أوض نوم) وصلت أرقام كبيرة، من وقت ما بدأ تطبيق قوانين تكلفة المعيشة في أكتوبر 2022. الزيادات دي بتعدي متوسط الزيادة السنوية في الإيجارات على مدار الـ12 سنة اللي فاتت بـ3 أضعاف على الأقل.

Unfortunately, this consultation paper seems like a further attempt to impose controls on the sector. A far simpler solution would be to let the market return to normal, not impose external controls on rent levels, and the result will be lower rent increases than we have seen in the last 18 months. To stabilise rental prices in the long term then the government must encourage greater investment and growth in the private rented sector (PRS) while simultaneously funding a substantial growth in the supply of social housing. The greater the investment in the PRS the more stability will be created in the housing market. Increasing volumes in both the PRS and social housing markets will stabilise rents over time as demand meets supply and equilibrium is achieved. Only by adopting these measures will we start to address the current housing crisis. Anything else is simply not going to work.	fa_IR	متأسفانه، این سند مشاوره به نظر تلاش دیگری برای تحمیل کنترل بر این بخش است. یک راه‌حل بسیار ساده‌تر این است که اجازه دهیم بازار به حالت عادی بازگردد، نه اینکه کنترل‌های خارجی بر سطح اجاره تحمیل شود، و نتیجه آن افزایش اجاره کمتر از آنچه در ۱۸ ماه گذشته دیده‌ایم خواهد بود. برای تثبیت قیمت اجاره در بلندمدت، دولت باید سرمایه‌گذاری و رشد بیشتری در بخش اجاره خصوصی (PRS) تشویق کند و هم‌زمان رشد قابل‌توجهی در عرضه مسکن اجتماعی تأمین کند. هر چه سرمایه‌گذاری در بخش اجاره خصوصی بیشتر باشد، ثبات بیشتری در بازار مسکن ایجاد خواهد شد. افزایش حجم در هر دو بازار بخش اجاره خصوصی و مسکن اجتماعی با گذشت زمان باعث تثبیت اجاره‌ها با توجه‌ به عرضه و تقاضا و رسیدن به تعادل خواهد شد. تنها با اتخاذ این تدابیر می‌توانیم شروع به رسیدگی به بحران فعلی مسکن کنیم. چیز دیگری کار نخواهد کرد.

The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	ru_RU	Проблемы Агентства по защите окружающей среды США (АООС) своеобразны, но также связаны с проблемами Министерства Юстиции, которое занимается экологическими правонарушениями, а именно Управления охраны окружающей среды и природных ресурсов (УООСПР). До работы в АООС Ульманн, заместитель исполнительного секретаря АООС, долгое время был главой Отдела экологических преступлений (с 1990 по 2007 год). АООС направляет наиболее важные гражданские и уголовные дела в УООСПР, которое в условиях недостаточного финансирования часто полагается на другие агентства при отборе дел. В 2022 финансовом году АООС передало наименьшее количество дел Министерству Юстиции с 2000 года (88) и также вынесло заключения по наименьшему количеству дел за тот же срок. Как отмечает Проект Экологической целостности, даже во время правления Трампа АООС в среднем выносило заключение по 94 гражданским делам и передавало 106 дел Министерству Юстиции в год.

The report also includes a comparison of hull loss accident rates per million departures, which helps account for the fact that some of the models are more common or have been around longer than others. The Airbus A310, which was introduced in 1983, has the highest rate of hull losses - 2.53 per 1 million departures - among the models that are still in service as passenger aircraft. The Airbus 320 family, which includes the A321 and A319neo, has the lowest rate, at 0.11. The Boeing 737 MAX line, which has been around since 2017, has a rate of 1.48.	ar_EG	التقرير كمان بيقارن معدلات الحوادث لكل مليون رحلة إقلاع، وده اللي بيوضح ليه بعض الطيارات أكتر شهرة من غيرها أو فضلت شغالة لفترة أطول. مثلًا، إيرباص A310 اللي ظهرت سنة 1983، سجلت أعلى معدل لتلف الهيكل - 2.53 حادثة لكل مليون عملية إقلاع - بين كل الطيارات اللي لسه بتشتغل. في المقابل، عيلة إيرباص 320، زي A321 وA319neo، سجلت أقل معدل 0.11. أما بوينج 737 ماكس، اللي شغالة من 2017، فمعدلها 1.48.

Masterfully working across subject matter, Siso has generated a prolific series of landscapes, portraits, and still-life works rendered in either acrylic, pastel, pencil or watercolor. Drawing from family portraits, his own reference photographs, and recollection, his colorful compositions demonstrate his range of interests and skill across media. Siso's tropical landscapes and seascapes reflect the geographies of his past, employing rich patterns and incorporating people to make meaningful connections between culture, memory and the environment. Siso titles his artworks in a mix of Spanish and English, signifying the celebrated and integral complexities of his life in Los Angeles County. "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" opens on Saturday, Jan. 13, with a reception from 6-8 p.m. The exhibition is on view through Sunday, March 3.	el_GR	Δουλεύοντας με δεξιοτεχνία σε διάφορα θέματα, ο Siso έχει δημιουργήσει πολυμελείς σειρές τοπίων, πορτρέτων και έργων νεκρής φύσης, τα οποία έχει αποδώσει είτε με ακρυλικό, παστέλ, μολύβι ή ακουαρέλα. Ζωγραφίζοντας από οικογενειακά πορτρέτα, δικές του φωτογραφίες αναφοράς και μνήμες, οι πολύχρωμες συνθέσεις του επιδεικνύουν το εύρος των ενδιαφερόντων του και των δεξιοτήτων του σε διάφορα μέσα. Τα τροπικά τοπία και τα θαλασσινά τοπία του Siso αντανακλούν τις γεωγραφίες του παρελθόντος του, μεταχειριζόμενα πλούσια μοτίβα και ενσωματώνοντας ανθρώπους για να κάνουν ουσιαστικές συνδέσεις μεταξύ κουλτούρας, μνήμης και περιβάλλοντος. The report also includes a comparison of hull loss accident rates per million departures, which helps account for the fact that some of the models are more common or have been around longer than others. The Airbus A310, which was introduced in 1983, has the highest rate of hull losses - 2.53 per 1 million departures - among the models that are still in service as passenger aircraft. The Airbus 320 family, which includes the A321 and A319neo, has the lowest rate, at 0.11. The Boeing 737 MAX line, which has been around since 2017, has a rate of 1.48.	fi_FI	Raporttiin sisältyy myös vertailuja täysin tuhoutuneiden koneiden määristä miljoonaa lentoa kohden, mikä auttaa ottamaan huomion sen, että jotkin mallit ovat suositumpia tai ovat olleet käytössä pidempään kuin muut. Airbus A310:lla, joka otettiin käyttöön vuonna 1983, on suurin määrä täysin tuhoutuneita koneita - 2,53 konetta miljoonaa lentoa kohden - niistä malleista, jotka ovat yhä käytössä matkustajakoneina. Airbus 320 -perheellä, johon sisältyvät A321 ja A319neo, on alhaisin määrä, 0,11. Boeing 737 MAX -sarjan, joka on ollut käytössä vuodesta 2017, määrä on 1,48.

About 450 million years ago, plants took a giant leap out of the oceans onto the land to become the plants that we know and love today. But how did they survive? Scientists at the John Innes Centre may have found out. Land plants survive by getting water and nutrients from the soil. They do this by forming a special friendship with soil-dwelling fungi called mycorrhiza. These strands of mycorrhiza reach deep into the soil and drag the nutrients and water back to the plants. But when the first algae landed on soil, how did they survive long enough to form these beneficial friendships?	uk_UA	Майже 450 мільйонів років тому відбувся потужний вихід рослин з океанів на сушу, і вони стали такими, якими ми знаємо й любимо їх сьогодні. Однак як вони вижили? Ймовірно, це з’ясували вчені з Центру Джона Іннеса. Наземні рослини існують, отримуючи воду та поживні речовини з ґрунту. Це відбувається завдяки особливій взаємодії з мікоризою – грибами, що населяють ґрунт. Вони проникають глибоко в ґрунт і забезпечують рослини поживними речовинами та водою. Та коли перші водорості потрапили на ґрунт, як їм вдалося прижитися і сформувати ці корисні взаємини?

Affordable furniture DIYs are always a hit here on Lone Fox, so I wanted to share with you guys how I created this nightstand from a simple crate from IKEA. So this is the Knagglig crate, which you can pick up for about $10 at IKEA. And I went ahead and I started off by just constructing it based off the instructions. You have to just screw all of the elements together. And once they are all screwed up, you have a basic wooden crate. Now on the bottom of the wooden crate, I wanted to add a leg, so I elevated it off the floor with these little wooden trinket dishes, or like little wooden trays that I found at the craft store as well. They are just a simple wood, very similar to the one from IKEA, and I just E6000ed these down. You could also use a nail gun if you'd like to. And once you are done, you have a very simple, minimal nightstand.	uk_UA	Доступні меблі, зроблені своїми руками, завжди популярні тут, на Lone Fox, тому я хотів би поділитися з вами, як я створив цю тумбочку з простого ящика з ІКЕА. Так от, це ящик Knagglig, який ви можете придбати в IKEA приблизно за 10 доларів. Я почав з того, що просто створив його згідно з інструкцією. Необхідно просто з’єднати всі елементи разом. І щойно все це буде прикручено, ви отримаєте базовий дерев’яний ящик. На дно дерев’яного ящика я вирішив додати ніжки, тому припідняв його над підлогою за допомогою маленьких дерев’яних підставок для дрібничок, які я також знайшов у крамниці для рукоділля. Вони виготовлені з простої деревини, дуже схожої на ту, що продається в ІКЕА, і я просто відшліфував їх на E6000. За бажанням ви також можете скористатися монтажним пістолетом. The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	no_NO	Problemene hos EPA er tydelige, men ikke urelatert til de i justisdepartementet som håndterer miljørelatert kriminalitet via Environment and Natural Resources Division, eller ENRD. I forkant av å ha blitt en del av EPA, har Uhlmann, assisterende sekretær i EPA for gjennomføring, fungert som leder for Environmental Crimes Section i mange år, fra 1990 til 2007. EPA sender de fleste alvorlige sivile saker og kriminalsaker til ENRD, og ENRD, som er relativt underfinansiert, er ofte avhengig av hjelp fra andre byråer for å velge hvilke kamper de skal ta. I skatteåret 2022 overførte EPA færre saker til DOJ (88) enn noen gang siden 2000 og fullførte også færre sivile juridiske saker enn siden den gang. Som Environmental Integrity Project påpeker, fullført selv Trumps EPA 94 sivile saker og overførte i gjennomsnitt 106 saker per år til DOJ.

The change gathered its own momentum. Recruiting salaried women as teachers and health workers from within their own communities boosted trust "and made women's mobility and work more socially acceptable."	fr_FR	La Banque mondiale cite d'autres exemples. Entre 1970 et 2022, le Bangladesh a multiplié par quatre l'alphabétisation féminine et doublé la participation des femmes à la force de travail. Résultat : son produit intérieur brut a plus que triplé, et du changement est né un nouvel élan. Le recrutement de femmes salariées comme enseignantes ou professionnelles de la santé au sein de leurs propres communautés a accentué le climat de confiance "et fait de la mobilité et du travail des femmes une réalité plus acceptable aux yeux de la société".

About 450 million years ago, plants took a giant leap out of the oceans onto the land to become the plants that we know and love today. But how did they survive? Scientists at the John Innes Centre may have found out. Land plants survive by getting water and nutrients from the soil. They do this by forming a special friendship with soil-dwelling fungi called mycorrhiza. These strands of mycorrhiza reach deep into the soil and drag the nutrients and water back to the plants. But when the first algae landed on soil, how did they survive long enough to form these beneficial friendships?	fr_FR	Il y a environ 450 millions d'années, les plantes ont fait un saut géant des océans jusqu'à la terre ferme et sont devenues les plantes que nous connaissons et aimons aujourd'hui. Mais comment ont-elles fait pour survivre ? Les chercheurs du John Innes Centre pourraient l'avoir découvert. Les plantes terrestres survivent en puisant de l'eau et des nutriments dans le sol. Elles le font en développant un lien spécial avec un champignon vivant sous terre appelé mycorhize. Ces filaments de mycorhizes s'enfoncent profondément dans le sol pour en extraire les nutriments et l'eau, qu'ils apportent aux plantes. Mais quand la première algue est arrivée sur la terre, comment a-t-elle survécu assez longtemps pour forger ces relations bénéfiques ?

Now let's continue. We've all done something self-destructive at some point in our lives. Most of the time, it's not intentional and doesn't become a habit. Self-destructive behaviors are those that are bound to harm you physically or mentally. It may be unintentional, or you may know exactly what you're doing, but the urge is too strong to control. Problems can eventually arise when this type of behavior becomes habitual. So, here are seven common behaviors of a self-destructive person.	bg_BG	Хей, Psych2Goers, добре дошли отново в нашия канал. Ние всички сме извършвали нещо саморазрушително в определен момент от живота си. В повечето случаи това не е било умишлено и не се е превърнало в навик. Right now the country of "co-determination" is simultaneously facing an eight-day "action week" by irate farmers, who blocked roads with tractors, a three-day strike of railway workers and, to top it off, a looming strike of doctors, who already closed surgeries between Christmas and New Year's Day. This Mistgabelmop (pitchfork mob), as some have taken to calling it, will test Germany's harmonious labour relations in the year to come.	ru_RU	В Германии, где крупными компаниями совместно управляют рабочие и руководители, в большой забастовке нет ничего необычного. Прямо сейчас страна с "совместным управлением" может столкнуться одновременно с восьмидневной "неделей действия" разгневанных фермеров, блокирующих дороги тракторами, трёхдневной забастовкой железнодорожных работников и, к тому же, надвигающейся забастовкой врачей, уже закрывавших операционные с Рождества по Новый Год. The Airbus A310, which was introduced in 1983, has the highest rate of hull losses - 2.53 per 1 million departures - among the models that are still in service as passenger aircraft. The Airbus 320 family, which includes the A321 and A319neo, has the lowest rate, at 0.11. Affordable furniture DIYs are always a hit here on Lone Fox, so I wanted to share with you guys how I created this nightstand from a simple crate from IKEA. So this is the Knagglig crate, which you can pick up for about $10 at IKEA. And I went ahead and I started off by just constructing it based off the instructions. You have to just screw all of the elements together. And once they are all screwed up, you have a basic wooden crate. Now on the bottom of the wooden crate, I wanted to add a leg, so I elevated it off the floor with these little wooden trinket dishes, or like little wooden trays that I found at the craft store as well. They are just a simple wood, very similar to the one from IKEA, and I just E6000ed these down. You could also use a nail gun if you'd like to. And once you are done, you have a very simple, minimal nightstand.	bn_IN	সাশ্রয়ী মূল্যের আসবাবপত্রের DIY সবসময়ই Lone Fox-এ জনপ্রিয়, তাই আমি আপনাদের সঙ্গে শেয়ার করতে চেয়েছিলাম যে কীভাবে IKEA থেকে কেনা একটি সাধারণ ক্রেট ব্যবহার করে আমি এই নাইটস্ট্যান্ডটি তৈরি করেছি। এটি হলো ন্যাগলিগ ক্রেট, যা আপনি মোটামুটি $১০ মূল্যে IKEA থেকে কিনতে পারেন। এবং আমি কেবলই নির্দেশাবলী দেখে এটি তৈরি করতে শুরু করি। আপনাকে শুধু সব উপাদান একসঙ্গে স্ক্রু দিয়ে জুড়ে নিতে হবে। আর একবার সবকিছু স্ক্রু দিয়ে জুড়ে ফেললে, আপনার কাছে একটি সাধারণ কাঠের ক্রেট থাকবে। এখন কাঠের ক্রেটটির নিচে, আমি একটি পায়া যোগ করতে চেয়েছি, তাই আমি এটিকে মাটি থেকে উঠিয়ে রাখতে ছোট কাঠের ট্রিঙ্কেট ডিশ বা ছোট কাঠের ট্রে ব্যবহার করেছি, যেগুলি আমি ক্রাফ্টস্টোর থেকেই পেয়েছি। এগুলি সাধারণ কাঠ, IKEA থেকে পাওয়া কাঠের মতোই, এবং আমি শুধু এগুলোকে ই৬০০০ আঠা দিয়েই আটকে দিয়েছি। আপনি চাইলে নেল গানও ব্যবহার করতে পারেন। আর একবার আপনার কাজ শেষ হয়ে গেলেই, আপনার কাছে থাকবে খুব সাধারণ কিন্তু সুন্দর একটা নাইটস্ট্যান্ড।

The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	ml_IN	EPA-യിലെ പ്രശ്‌നങ്ങൾ വ്യത്യസ്തമാണെങ്കിലും നീതിന്യായ വകുപ്പിലുള്ളവയിൽ നിന്ന് വേറിട്ട് നിൽക്കുന്നതല്ല, അത് പരിസ്ഥിതിയുമായി ബന്ധപ്പെട്ട കുറ്റകൃത്യങ്ങളെ അതിന്റെ 'പരിസ്ഥിതിയും പ്രകൃതി വിഭവങ്ങളും വിഭാഗം' അല്ലെങ്കിൽ ENRD വഴി കൈകാര്യം ചെയ്യുന്നു. EPA-യിൽ ചേരുന്നതിനു മുമ്പ്, എൻഫോഴ്‌സ്മെന്റിനുള്ള EPA അസിസ്റ്റന്റ് സെക്രട്ടറിയായ ഉൽമാൻ 1990 മുതൽ 2007 വരെയുള്ള കായളവിൽ ആ ഡിവിഷന്റെ പരിസ്ഥിതി കുറ്റകൃത്യങ്ങൾ വിഭാഗത്തിൽ ജോലി ചെയ്തിട്ടുണ്ട്. EPA അതിന്റെ ഗുരുതര സ്വഭാവമുള്ള മിക്ക സിവിൽ, ക്രിമിനൽ കേസുകളും ENRD-യ്ക്ക് അയയ്ക്കുന്നു, താരതമ്യേന കുറഞ്ഞ ഫണ്ട് ലഭിക്കുന്ന ആ വിഭാഗം പലപ്പോഴും ഏതൊക്കെ ഏറ്റെടുക്കണമെന്ന് തീരുമാനിക്കാൻ സഹായിക്കുന്നതിൽ മറ്റ് ഏജൻസികളെ ആശ്രയിക്കുന്നു. 2022 സാമ്പത്തിക വർഷത്തിൽ, EPA ഏതാനും കേസുകൾ DOJ-യ്ക്ക് (88) കൈമാറിയിട്ടുണ്ട്. 2000-ന് ശേഷമുള്ള കാലഘട്ടത്തിലെ ഏറ്റവും ഉയർന്നതാണിത്, കൂടാതെ ആ കാലയളവിനേക്കാൾ വളരെ കുറച്ച് സിവിൽ ജുഡീഷ്യൽ കേസുകളാണ് തീർപ്പാക്കിയത്. എൻവയോൺമെന്റൽ ഇന്റഗ്രിറ്റി പ്രോജക്റ്റ് കുറിപ്പുകളിൽ പറയുന്നതു പോലെ, ട്രംപിന്റെ EPA പോലും പ്രതിവർഷം 94 സിവിൽ കേസുകൾ തീർപ്പാക്കുകയും ശരാശരി 106 കേസുകൾ DOJ-യിലേക്ക് മാറ്റുകയും ചെയ്തിട്ടുണ്ട്.

It should in no way signal the Commission's willingness to approve listing standards for crypto asset securities. To create the antique brass ornament, I just went in with a coat of rub and buff onto the entire ornament there. And then of course, we have to get that antique look with the alcohol ink. So I went in with ginger first. I applied a droplet onto our ornament and just blended it out like so. And I just continued that process until I had as many layers as I liked, and it looked really antiqued in like an actual metal ornament. After that, I did go in with a little bit more of that burnished amber spray paint as well, and just applied that to the surface, to kind of give it that oxidized look like we did for the bell ornaments. And that is how I finished off these antique brass bobbles. Really simple and easy, but honestly, they look like real metal and they're beautiful.	da_DK	For at skabe det antikke messingornament, gav jeg det bare et lag Rub 'n Buff. Og så skal vi selvfølgelig have det antikke look frem med Alcohol Ink. Så jeg startede med farven ginger. Jeg påførte en dråbe på ornamentet og blendede det bare ud sådan her. Og jeg fortsatte bare den proces, indtil jeg havde så mange lag, som jeg kunne lide, og det så virkelig antikt ud, som et rigtigt metalornament. Derefter brugte jeg også lidt mere af den brændte ravfarvede spraymaling, og påførte den bare på overfladen, for at give den det oxiderede look, ligesom vi gjorde med klokkeornamenterne. Og det er sådan, jeg færdiggjorde disse antikke messingpynt. Virkelig enkelt og nemt, men ærligt, de ligner ægte metal, og de er smukke.

The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	id_ID	Masalah yang terjadi di EPA berbeda, tetapi masih berkaitan dengan masalah yang terjadi di Departemen Kehakiman yang menangani kejahatan lingkungan melalui Divisi Lingkungan dan Sumber Daya Alamnya (Environment and Natural Resources Division atau ENRD). Sebelum bergabung dengan EPA, Uhlmann--sekretaris asisten EPA untuk lingkungan--telah lama menjabat sebagai kepala Bagian Kriminal Lingkungan divisi tersebut, mulai tahun 1990 hingga 2007. EPA mengirimkan kasus sipil dan kriminal yang paling besar ke ENRD, yang--sebagai kantor yang relatif kekurangan dana--sering kali meminta bantuan lembaga lain dalam memilih kasus mana yang akan diambil. Pada tahun fiskal 2022, EPA melimpahkan lebih sedikit kasus ke DOJ (88) serta menyelesaikan lebih sedikit kasus yudisial sipil dibandingkan tahun-tahun sebelumnya sejak tahun 2000. Seperti yang dicatat oleh Proyek Integritas Lingkungan, secara rata-rata, EPA era Trump bahkan menyelesaikan 94 kasus sipil dan melimpahkan 106 kasus per tahun ke DOJ per tahun.

In 2019, Ukraine adopted a law that makes using the Ukrainian language obligatory in all spheres of public life, including government, medicine, science, education, and the media. Failure to comply can result in fines. Since 2022, when the military conflict with Russia began, Ukraine has undertaken a campaign of total de-Russification, with MPs saying it is necessary in order to defend against Russian influence. Local authorities have introduced complete bans on Russian-language works of art, performances, books, films, songs, and its study in schools and universities, and recommended that schoolchildren communicate in Ukrainian even during breaks.	id_ID	Pada tahun 2019, Ukraina menerapkan hukum yang mewajibkan penggunaan bahasa Ukraina di seluruh aspek kehidupan masyarakat, termasuk pemerintahan, kesehatan, ilmu pengetahuan, pendidikan, dan media. Pelanggarnya akan dikenai denda. Sejak tahun 2022, ketika konflik militer dengan Rusia dimulai, Ukraina telah menggelar kampanye penghapusan pengaruh Rusia secara menyeluruh setelah Anggota Parlemen mengatakan bahwa hal tersebut diperlukan untuk membendung pengaruh Rusia. Another useful resource the FAA links to is the Boeing Worldwide Statistical Summary of Commercial Jet Airplane Accidents 1959-2022, which assesses plane-type safety by breaking down accidents based on the aircraft model. According to the report, which was published in September 2023, the Boeing 787 and Airbus A350 are the aircraft models with the fewest total hull losses, an accident in which the aircraft is destroyed beyond repair. About 450 million years ago, plants took a giant leap out of the oceans onto the land to become the plants that we know and love today. But how did they survive? Scientists at the John Innes Centre may have found out. Land plants survive by getting water and nutrients from the soil. They do this by forming a special friendship with soil-dwelling fungi called mycorrhiza. These strands of mycorrhiza reach deep into the soil and drag the nutrients and water back to the plants. But when the first algae landed on soil, how did they survive long enough to form these beneficial friendships?	fi_FI	Noin 450 miljoonaa vuotta sitten kasvit ottivat valtavan harppauksen meristä maalle muuntautuakseen kasveiksi, jotka tunnemme ja joita rakastamme tänään. Mutta miten ne selviytyivät? Tutkijat John Innes Centressä ovat saattaneet selvittää vastauksen. Maalla elävät kasvit selviävät muodostamalla erityisen ystävyyssuhteen maaperässä elävien sienien, joita kutsutaan sienijuuriksi, kanssa. Nämä sienijuurisäikeet kurottavat syvälle maaperään ja vetävät ravintoaineita ja vettä kasveihin. He told Le Monde that he had "emerged from ignorance" and would abandon the practice.	he_IL	במספר קהילות אפריקאיות באזורי ספר, ארגונים חברתיים אזרחיים מפעילים תוכניות לחינוך בריאותי כדי להפסיק טקסי התבגרות מסוכנים. תוכנית אחת כזו עזרה לשנות את דעתו של קמנדה טימאיו, מנהיג הכפר מאפאראשה של שבט המסאי בקניה, לגבי הטלת מום באברי המין של נשים. הוא סיפר בעיתון "לה מונד" שהוא "החכים" ויחדל מהמנהג הזה.

Tierra del Sol is pleased to present "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" at the new gallery location in West Hollywood. Siso has been an artist in the Studio Arts Program since 2012, this marks his debut solo exhibition. Siso was born 1962 in Madrid and raised between Venezuela, Trinidad and Miami; he moved with his family to Southern California in his early 20s.	he_IL	Tierra del Sol גאה להציג את התערוכה "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" במיקום החדש של הגלריה, בווסט הוליווד. סיסו הוא אומן בתכנית Studio Arts מאז שנת 2012, וזוהי תערוכת היחיד הראשונה שלו. סיסו נולד במדריד ב-1962 וגדל בוונצואלה, טרינידד ומיאמי. הוא עבר עם משפחתו לדרום קליפורניה בתחילת שנות ה-20 שלו.
